Our Story

The Ashakky Way

Born from a passion for making every woman feel irresistibly confident, Crave Me by Ashakky is Ibadan's premier destination for premium intimates and lingerie.


Founded by Opeyemi, we believe that what you wear closest to your skin should make you feel like your most beautiful, powerful self — every single day.


From playful pyjama sets to elegant lace ensembles, every piece is carefully curated for quality, comfort, and that irresistible feeling you deserve.

Why Choose Us

The Crave Me Promise

✦
Premium Quality
Every piece is carefully selected for comfort, durability, and that luxurious feel you deserve.
🚚
Swift Delivery
Fast delivery across Ibadan and nationwide shipping. Your order comes to you, not the other way around.
🔒
Discreet Packaging
Your privacy matters. All orders arrive in discreet packaging with no branding on the outside.
💬
Personal Service
Chat directly with Opeyemi on WhatsApp. Get personalized recommendations and real-time support.

Simple Process

How to Order

Getting your favourites is as easy as 1, 2, 3, 4

1
Browse & Pick
Explore the collection and choose what you love. Note the product name and your size.
2
Click Order
Hit "Order on WhatsApp" — it opens a pre-filled chat straight to Ashakky with your details.
3
Pay & Confirm
Confirm your order, pay via bank transfer, and your items get packaged beautifully.
4
Enjoy ✦
Receive your discreetly packaged order and feel absolutely amazing!
💬 Start Your Order on WhatsApp
